2026-04-23T09:40:01.9538199Z ##[group]Run # Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct
2026-04-23T09:40:01.9539828Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-23T09:40:01.9540769Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-23T09:40:01.9542222Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-23T09:40:01.9543275Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-04-23T09:40:01.9543872Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
